description: Lock the 2026-06-27 correction that scopes surveying_theodolite_early_precision to telescope-equipped early modern precision theodolites rather than generic pre-telescope angle instruments.

checks.reason: The scoped node now anchors to Jonathan Sisson's 1725 telescope-equipped theodolite rather than a generic Renaissance placeholder.
The scoped instrument explicitly includes a sighting telescope, so telescope remains an enabling optical dependency.
Earlier optical knowledge is retained as lineage while the telescope edge carries the direct optical instrument dependency.
